description: Calculate moving averages using various methods (simple, exponential, weighted)

variations.name: 20-day simple moving average for stock price
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_average(columns='close_price', window=20, method='simple')

variations.name: 12-period exponential moving average for trend analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_average(columns='price', window=12, method='exponential')

variations.name: 30-day weighted moving average for volume data
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_average(columns='volume', window=30, method='weighted')

variations.name: Moving averages by sector for grouped analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_average(columns='price', window=20, method='simple', group_columns=['sector', 'market_cap'])

variations.name: Time-based moving averages using timestamp column
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_average(columns='price', window=30, method='simple', time_column='timestamp')

description: Calculate moving variance and standard deviation for volatility analysis

variations.name: 30-day moving variance for returns analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_variance(columns='returns', window=30, var_suffix='_var', std_suffix='_std')

variations.name: Moving variance with custom degrees of freedom
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_variance(columns='returns', window=30, ddof=0, var_suffix='_var', std_suffix='_std')

description: Calculate moving sum over specified windows

variations.name: 5-day moving sum of daily trading volume
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_sum(columns='volume', window=5, output_suffix='_sum')

description: Calculate moving quantiles for distribution analysis

variations.name: Moving quantiles (25th, 50th, 75th percentiles) for price distribution
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_quantile(columns='price', quantile=[0.25, 0.5, 0.75], window=60)

variations.name: Moving quantiles with custom output suffixes
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_quantile(columns='price', quantile=[0.1, 0.9], window=50, output_suffix='_decile')

description: Calculate moving correlation between column pairs

variations.name: 20-day moving correlation between stock price and volume
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_correlation(column_pairs=[('price', 'volume')], window=20, output_suffix='_corr')

variations.name: Moving correlation between multiple stock pairs
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_correlation(column_pairs=[('stock_a', 'stock_b'), ('stock_a', 'stock_c'), ('stock_b', 'stock_c')], window=60, output_suffix='_corr')

description: Calculate moving z-scores for outlier detection

variations.name: 30-day moving z-scores for outlier detection
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_zscore(columns='price', window=30, output_suffix='_zscore')

description: Detect peaks and troughs in time series data

variations.name: Detect turning points in price data with 15-day window
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | detect_turning_points(columns='price', window=15, threshold=2.0, peak_suffix='_peak', trough_suffix='_trough')

variations.name: Detect turning points with custom threshold for trend reversal
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | detect_turning_points(columns='price', window=10, threshold=5.0, min_periods=5)

description: Calculate moving ratios between two columns

variations.name: Moving ratio of high price to low price for volatility measurement
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_ratio(numerator_column='high_price', denominator_column='low_price', window=20, output_column='high_low_ratio')

variations.name: Moving ratio with zero handling for financial ratios
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_ratio(numerator_column='revenue', denominator_column='cost', window=20, fill_zeroes=True, output_column='profit_margin')

description: Calculate time-weighted averages with exponential decay

variations.name: Time-weighted average with exponential decay for recent emphasis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | time_weighted_average(columns='price', window=30, decay_factor=0.9, output_suffix='_twa')

variations.name: Time-weighted average with custom decay for momentum analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | time_weighted_average(columns='momentum', window=20, decay_factor=0.95, time_column='timestamp', output_suffix='_twa')

variations.name: Moving cumulative sum of daily returns over expanding window
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_cumulative(columns='returns', operation='sum', window=None, output_suffix='_cumsum')

variations.name: Moving cumulative product for compound growth analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_cumulative(columns='growth_rate', operation='product', window=12, output_suffix='_cumprod')

variations.name: Expanding window mean for long-term trend analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | expanding_window(columns='price', operation='mean', output_suffix='_exp_mean')

variations.name: Expanding window standard deviation for volatility trend
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | expanding_window(columns='returns', operation='std', time_column='timestamp', output_suffix='_exp_std')

description: Calculate moving minimum and maximum values

variations.name: Moving minimum and maximum values for range analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_min_max(columns='price', window=20, min_suffix='_min', max_suffix='_max')

description: Count occurrences in moving windows based on conditions

variations.name: Count positive returns in moving windows for trend strength analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_count(columns='returns', condition=lambda x: x > 0, window=30, output_suffix='_positive_count')

description: Calculate moving percentile rank for relative performance analysis

variations.name: Moving percentile rank for relative performance analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_percentile_rank(columns='returns', window=60, output_suffix='_rank')

variations.name: Moving percentile rank with time-based grouping
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_percentile_rank(columns='returns', window=30, time_column='timestamp', group_columns=['sector'], output_suffix='_rank')

description: Apply custom functions to moving windows

variations.name: Apply custom skewness function to moving windows

description: Calculate moving regression coefficients for trend analysis

variations.name: Moving regression coefficients for trend analysis
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_regression(dependent_column='price', independent_columns='volume', window=50, output_suffix='_reg')

variations.name: Moving regression with multiple independent variables
variations.example:
moving_pipe = MovingAggrPipe.from_dataframe(data)
moving_pipe = moving_pipe | moving_regression(dependent_column='price', independent_columns=['volume', 'market_index'], window=60, intercept=True, save_coefficients=True, save_predictions=True, save_residuals=True)
